special_mechanics.name: Axe Combat
special_mechanics.description: Rick wields an axe as primary weapon instead of punches/kicks

special_mechanics.name: Shotgun Pickup
special_mechanics.description: Limited ammo shotgun available during certain levels

special_mechanics.name: Experience Point System
special_mechanics.description: Defeating enemies increases Rick's health bar; enemy count needed displayed on screen

special_mechanics.name: Platforming Focus
special_mechanics.description: Game emphasizes platforming over beat 'em up gameplay

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No quantitative physics parameters documented. Sources contain only gameplay mechanics, level structure data, and debug mode information. No precise movement values, gravity constants, or sub-pixel calculations available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Splatterhouse: Wanpaku Graffiti
